_comment: Schneider Electric solution catalog, verified against se.com. Pricing is illustrative EUR/m2 (adjustable, not an official quote). energy_saving_fraction = fraction of the TARGETED end-use(s) avoided. 'vendor' identifies Schneider vs 3rd-party. 'layer' = EcoStruxure layer (onboard=Connected Products, operate=Edge Control, optimize=Apps/Analytics/Services). The 'platform' section lists Schneider Apps/Analytics/Services that orchestrate the roadmap (shown in the Optimize layer; not separately priced to avoid double-counting).

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Connected Room (SpaceLogic occupancy control)
reduce.product: SpaceLogic room controllers + Insight-Sensor + EcoStruxure Building Operation
reduce.note: Occupancy- and people-count-based control of HVAC and lighting at room level.
reduce.source: se.com: Connected Room / SpaceLogic; up to 23% energy savings.

reduce.name: LED relamping + SpaceLogic / KNX lighting control
reduce.product: LED luminaires (3rd-party) + SpaceLogic / KNX lighting control
reduce.note: LED retrofit (3rd-party luminaires) with Schneider daylight/presence control.
reduce.source: Industry benchmark ~EUR 20-40/m2; LED + controls cut lighting 40-60%.

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Building Operation (enterprise BMS)
reduce.note: Enterprise building management: supervision, scheduling, continuous commissioning, setpoint optimisation. For mid/large buildings.

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Building Activate (small / mid-size buildings)
reduce.note: Cloud building management for small/mid buildings (under ~9,300 m2). Alternative to EBO for small sites.
reduce.source: se.com: EcoStruxure Building Activate for small/mid buildings.

reduce.name: Altivar variable speed drives on HVAC motors
reduce.product: Altivar process / HVAC variable speed drives
reduce.note: Speed control of pumps and fans replaces throttling/damper losses.
reduce.source: se.com: Altivar drives; VSDs cut motor energy 20-30%.

reduce.name: EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert (PowerLogic + PowerTag)
reduce.product: EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert (PME) + PowerLogic PowerTag sensors
reduce.note: Sub-metering visibility and alarms drive operational/behavioural savings across all loads.

reduce.name: Smart plug-load control (metered PDUs / sockets)
reduce.product: 3rd-party smart PDUs / sockets, integrated via EcoStruxure
reduce.note: Standby control and scheduling of plug loads via 3rd-party smart PDUs (not a Schneider commercial product; Wiser is the residential line).

replace.name: Rooftop solar PV
replace.product: 3rd-party PV panels + Schneider inverters & EcoStruxure Microgrid Operation
replace.source: Sizing from usable roof area and location specific yield.

replace.name: Battery energy storage
replace.note: Shifts daytime PV surplus into evening load to lift self-consumption.

replace.name: Green power PPA / RECs
replace.product: Schneider Sustainability Business (PPA / REC sourcing & advisory)
replace.note: Cleans residual grid import on a market-based basis (Scope 2 market).
replace.source: se.com: Schneider Sustainability Business / Energy & Sustainability Services.

electrify.name: Electrify gas heating with heat pumps
electrify.product: 3rd-party heat pumps + EcoStruxure Building Operation control
electrify.note: Removes Scope 1 combustion; adds a smaller electric load via heat-pump COP.
electrify.source: Heat pump COP ~3.2 vs boiler efficiency ~0.88.

electrify.name: Replace standby genset with grid + storage
electrify.note: Removes diesel combustion by sourcing standby power from grid/storage.

electrify.name: Electrify combustion vehicle fleet
electrify.product: EVlink Pro chargers + EcoStruxure EV Charging Expert
electrify.note: Replaces fleet fuel with EV charging load (much higher drivetrain efficiency).
electrify.source: se.com: EVlink Pro + EcoStruxure EV Charging Expert.

platform.name: EcoStruxure Resource Advisor
platform.note: Enterprise energy, carbon and ESG data, analytics and reporting (the GHG accounting backbone).

platform.name: EcoStruxure Building Advisor
platform.note: Cloud fault-detection & diagnostics and analytics on the BMS data.

platform.name: EcoStruxure Microgrid Advisor
platform.note: AI optimisation/dispatch of on-site PV, storage and flexible loads.

platform.name: Planon (Integrated Workplace Management)
platform.note: IWMS for space, asset and workplace optimisation (Schneider holds a strategic stake in Planon).
platform.source: se.com: Planon Workplace; Schneider investment in Planon (2020).
